rows.label: qev060401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Umm... excuse me. You are someone with
the role known as a BLADE, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Would individuals like yourself
be willing to undertake jobs
from ugly aliens like us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Answer that you accept
requests from anyone.

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Answer that you only accept
requests from those you can trust.

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0003
rows.name:
...What incredibly open-minded
individuals you are! Well then, there
is a request I would like to make.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see... then it cannot be helped. We
have absolutely nothing we can show
you to prove ourselves, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Pardon my intrusion. Please pay
us no mind and proceed on your way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0006
rows.name:
We have a brethren named Arsenican,
but a short while ago, he went to
Nightglow Forest all alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0007
rows.name:
It is true that high-quality Voltant
springs forth in Nightglow Forest.
However... this is not Planet Bedun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0008
rows.name:
At this rate, he will be killed by
the native creatures of the forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0009
rows.name:
I want you to bring him back
here no matter what it takes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask for details regarding the reason why
Arsenican went to Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask about the unfamiliar term "Voltant."

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0010
rows.name:
...That is a very good question. Just as expected
of a BLADE. I can catch glimpses of your composure
in every part of our conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0011
rows.name:
We Zaruboggan are a species that
lives solely to revoltant a world
that has turned into Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0012
rows.name:
If we hear there is a place where Voltant
has multiplied, we simply lose all control
and cannot restrain ourselves...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is extremely helpful when
you point out the inadequacies
in my explanations like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0014
rows.name:
How much do you Earthlings grasp about the Zaruboggan,
and what exactly should we be demonstrating to you...
I have not yet fully comprehended this myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Simply put, it serves as our
nutrition... But I suppose that
explanation is far too simplistic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0016
rows.name:
To revoltant it is our mission,
and our very reason for existing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0017
rows.name:
I cannot seem to provide a particularly
good explanation... Let's see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0018
rows.name:
For example... if food were placed in front of
you after several days of fasting, wouldn't you
instinctively want to pounce on it as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0019
rows.name:
We constantly harbor that
exact sort of emotion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0020
rows.name:
It was my duty as a manager to
control that desire among my brethren
in this dangerous land, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Following the voice of Golbogga
etched into his very body,
Arsenican has departed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0022
rows.name:
I am sorry... but could you please
save the life of my precious brethren
who is so faithful to his mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Thank you very much. I believe Arsenican
is heading towards the Poison Copper
Spring Cave in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0024
rows.name:
A life of a brethren, a child of
Golbogga... Please, I beg you to save him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0025
rows.name:
If we were to encounter the native
creatures of Nightglow Forest, we
wouldn't stand a chance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0026
rows.name:
I am begging you. A life of a brethren, a
child of Golbogga... Please, save him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Oh... thank you very much. I have heard
everything that happened from Arsenican.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0028
rows.name:
As the manager of Planet Bedun's
Northern 3C District, please allow
me to present you with this reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0029
rows.name:
This is a token of gratitude for saving
a precious child of Golbogga. Thank you
truly, from the bottom of my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0030
rows.name:
You see... it is probably inappropriate
for someone who manages everyone to
voice complaints like this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0031
rows.name: I also understand how Arsenican feels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Our home planet Bedun was a paradise where the
entire planet was filled with Voltant... Mira
is simply too pure for us to live on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Even though we are restraining ourselves,
the Zaruboggan's desires... our hunger
grows stronger with each passing day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Sympathize with the
Zaruboggan's circumstances.

rows.label: qev060401_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask if it's possible to survive
on the things available in NLA.

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0034
rows.name:
You are like Golbogga, overflowing
with deep affection...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0035
rows.name:
It is precisely because we were
drawn to this planet that I was
able to meet you like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0036
rows.name:
When I think of it that way, I can
endure even amidst this intense
hunger and face the days ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Fortunately, Earthlings seem
to possess a genius-level
talent for producing Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Therefore, I intend to skillfully
obtain Voltant in this city and
somehow manage to survive.[ST:wait ]
